title: Atlas Expansion XVIII: Domains 926-955 (Stochastic Analysis & Random Geometry)

D929.reason: KPZ renormalization; complex algebraic structures = EML-3

D941.reason: Scaling limit of planar maps; complex = EML-3

D944.reason: Critical Ising → SLE₃: complex analytic = EML-3

D948.name: First passage percolation

D952.reason: Betti numbers over filtration; real = EML-2

verdicts.stochastic: Itô/Malliavin: EML-2; KPZ/LQG/GFF: EML-3; Ising: EML-1; FK perc: EML-∞
verdicts.random_geometry: Brownian map/SLE/RMT: EML-3; TDA: EML-2; first passage: EML-∞

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 18 (T157, S437): 30 stochastic/random geometry domains. Regularity structures (Hairer KPZ): EML-3 (complex algebraic renormalization). Liouville quantum gravity: EML-3 (KPZ formula + complex log-correlations). SLE scaling limits (Brownian map, Ising, UST): EML-3. Itô/Malliavin/rough paths: EML-2 (real stochastic). FK percolation, first passage: EML-∞. 0 violations. Total domains: 955.
rabbit_hole_log: Regularity structures: EML-3 (renormalization = complex algebraic tree structure)
LQG: EML-3 (e^{γh} random measure; KPZ = complex analytic)
Ising critical interface → SLE₃: EML-3 (Loewner = complex analytic)
